name: figma-in-codex
description: Codex Design(Figma in Codex) connects Codex's in-app browser Figma context to the official Figma MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex understand and modify the Figma file currently open in the in-app browser.
interface.longDescription: Codex Design(Figma in Codex) resolves the current Figma file and live companion-plugin selection, then guides Codex through official Figma MCP read, write, screenshot verification, and local operation logging workflows.
defaultPrompt: Start figma-in-codex and prepare Figma editing context.
Open Figma in Codex and set up the current file.
Use the current Figma selection as the target.
Inspect the current Figma frame and suggest a safe modification.
Modify the selected Figma node and verify it with a screenshot.
